name: talking-head-video-factory
description: Multi-format talking-head workflow with semantic editing, visual components, captions, QA, and delivery.

scripts.test:visual-library: node --test console/jobs.test.mjs console/color-system.test.mjs scripts/component-registry.test.mjs scripts/visual-preview-lib.test.mjs visual-assets/catalog.test.mjs
scripts.app: node -e "if(process.platform==='darwin'){require('child_process').execFileSync('bash',['scripts/make-app.sh'],{stdio:'inherit'})}else{console.log('make-app.sh 仅 macOS。Windows 请运行: npm run app:win');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate && npm run inspect
scripts.smoke: node scripts/create-smoke-job.mjs && node scripts/build-beats-composition.mjs --job jobs/smoke && cd jobs/smoke && npm run check
scripts.smoke:full: npm run smoke && cd jobs/smoke && npm run render:final && cd ../.. && npm run qa -- --job jobs/smoke --video jobs/smoke/renders/final-60fps.mp4 && npm run deliver -- --job jobs/smoke --video jobs/smoke/renders/final-60fps.mp4
scripts.smoke:multi: node scripts/create-smoke-job.mjs && npm run build:variants -- --job jobs/smoke && npm run check:variants -- --job jobs/smoke
scripts.regression: node scripts/create-regression-job.mjs && npm run build:variants -- --job jobs/regression && npm run check:variants -- --job jobs/regression
